User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI training / content-signal opt-outs (preserved from the prior
# Cloudflare-auto-generated robots.txt). Any crawler added to this list
# becomes a site-wide block on its next fetch.

User-agent: Amazonbot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: CloudflareBrowserRenderingCrawler
Disallow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: meta-externalagent
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://nusayb.me/sitemap.xml
